title: Banks in Gulf Evacuate Their Offices
summary_full: After an overnight attack on a bank, Iranian officials signaled a new willingness to target economic centers and banks with ties to the United States.
summary_public: After an overnight attack on a bank, Iranian officials signaled a new willingness to target economic centers and banks with ties to the United States.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iranian officials signaled a new willingness to target economic centers
